description: An example MCP server demonstrating basic functionality

parsed_description.main: An example tool that demonstrates MCP functionality.
parsed_description.returns: Dict[str, Any]: Result of the example operation containing processed message info

parsed_description.main: A simple echo tool that returns the input with optional metadata.

parsed_description.returns: Dict[str, Any]: Echo response with optional metadata

include_metadata.description: Whether to include metadata in the response
include_metadata.title: Include Metadata

parsed_description.main: Get the current status of the example server.
parsed_description.raises: Exception: If unable to get status
